title: Two
sourceTitle: Two Reference Subjects Passport Photo String Telephone AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image 1:1 square concept using two uploaded reference portraits before passport-print string telephone concept, preserving first subject from the uploaded reference images and second subject from the uploaded reference images in two side-by-side passport-style photo prints. Subject: first subject from the uploaded reference images appears in the left passport print with preserved identity, hairstyle, facial features, simple dark sweatshirt, clean blue background, and holding a white paper cup near their mouth while laughing cheerfully; second subject from the uploaded reference images appears in the right passport print with preserved identity, hairstyle, facial features, simple dark sweatshirt, clean blue background, and holding a white paper cup against their ear with a wide smile and playful tongue-out expression. Scene: A person holds the two printed passport photos side by side between thumb and index finger, with authentic photo paper texture, clean studio lighting, and shallow depth of field. Composition: Centered square composition: two passport prints aligned evenly, left and right blue-background portraits placed side by side, with a thin white string extending perfectly from the left cup to the right cup across the two separate prints creating a seamless string telephone illusion between the cups. Signature Elements: Preserved two reference subjects passport photo string telephone source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Ultra-realistic passport-photo style mixed with playful concept photography, sharp focus, authentic printed photograph appearance, highly detailed facial features, wholesome humor, and professional studio quality. Color Palette: Clean passport blue backgrounds, white paper cups and string, dark sweatshirt neutrals, natural skin tones from the references, white photo borders, and soft studio grays. Lighting: Clean studio lighting on the photo prints, subtle paper sheen, soft hand shadows, shallow depth separation, and crisp face detail inside both printed images. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

imagePrompts.title: Two Reference Subjects Passport Photo String Telephone Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image 1:1 square concept using uploaded pair reference before two-photo paper-cup communication illusion, preserving left reference person with exact facial features and hairstyle preserved and right reference person with exact facial features and hairstyle preserved in two side-by-side passport-style photo prints. Subject: left reference person with exact facial features and hairstyle preserved appears in the left passport print with preserved identity, hairstyle, facial features, simple dark sweatshirt, clean blue background, and speaking into a small white paper cup with a natural laughing expression; right reference person with exact facial features and hairstyle preserved appears in the right passport print with preserved identity, hairstyle, facial features, simple dark sweatshirt, clean blue background, and listening through the cup with a funny lighthearted grin. Scene: A person holds the two printed passport photos side by side between thumb and index finger, with authentic photo paper texture, clean studio lighting, and shallow depth of field. Composition: Centered square composition: two passport prints aligned evenly, left and right blue-background portraits placed side by side, with one continuous taut white string visually crossing the gap between both passport photos creating a seamless string telephone illusion between the cups. Signature Elements: Preserved two reference subjects passport photo string telephone source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Ultra-realistic passport-photo style mixed with playful concept photography, sharp focus, authentic printed photograph appearance, highly detailed facial features, wholesome humor, and professional studio quality. Color Palette: Clean passport blue backgrounds, white paper cups and string, dark sweatshirt neutrals, natural skin tones from the references, white photo borders, and soft studio grays. Lighting: Clean studio lighting on the photo prints, subtle paper sheen, soft hand shadows, shallow depth separation, and crisp face detail inside both printed images. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
